title: SEC EDGAR Data Pipeline
summary: Complete operational guide for setting up, running, and debugging the edgartools-platform SEC EDGAR data pipeline, covering architecture, MDM setup, AWS provisioning, Snowflake bootstrap, and common failure patterns.
scope_summary: End-to-end setup and operations guide for the SEC EDGAR data pipeline. Covers architecture layers (Bronze/Source/Gold), MDM entity resolution, AWS ECS/Terraform provisioning, Snowflake native pull bootstrap, dbt gold tables, and troubleshooting common failures.
key_requirements: MDM_DATABASE_URL env var required for MDM commands
NEO4J_URI, NEO4J_USER, NEO4J_PASSWORD env vars required for Neo4j connectivity
EDGAR_IDENTITY env var required by SEC rate-limiting policy
edgartools PyPI package is a required runtime dependency
Snowflake Enterprise+ edition required for dynamic tables (CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE)
Tracked universe must be seeded before running edgar-warehouse bootstrap
Two-pass Snowflake bootstrap required: capture external ID then re-apply AWS Terraform
key_constraints: Runtime uses service-assumed roles (sec_platform_runner_execution, sec_platform_runner_task, sec_platform_runner_step_functions) — no runner IAM user or access keys
Prod bronze bucket has prevent_destroy = true — protected by design
Docker push in linux mode requires a Linux runner; use WSL script on Windows
Dynamic tables require Snowflake Enterprise+ edition
SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT must be set as ORGNAME-ACCOUNTNAME format
